sourceMovie.title: 24 Hours to Live
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: 24 Hours to Live works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Looper
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 24 Hours to Live clicked for you, Looper (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The International
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 24 Hours to Live clicked for you, The International (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after 24 Hours to Live?
faq.answer: Try Looper, The International, The Long Kiss Goodnight—each shares DNA with 24 Hours to Live while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is 24 Hours to Live?
faq.answer: 24 Hours to Live (2017) is best described as Action, Science Fiction, Thriller, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is 24 Hours to Live worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
